emails.subject: EOL trades doubled up?
emails.body: Jeff, since Dutch is still out could you take care of this I'm not exactly sure what he is talking about. The trades should be part of a spread in whcich reliant is also buying or selling the hub. Thanks Forwarded by Peter F Keavey/HOU/ECT on 12/07/2000 07:03 AM From: Larry Joe Hunter 12/06/2000 08:36 PM
